prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年青海省理科/物理类最低录取位次分别为约2941名→3497名→2979名→3143名→3394名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近5年累计后移约453名；2025年基准位次约3394名；该校在青海省理科/物理类招生计划2021–2025年均为6人，2026年增至8人，扩招约33%，招生名额增加使竞争压力有所缓解，但位次数字预计后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第59名→2022年第63名→2023年第63名→2024年第66名→2025年第72名→2026年第65名，近年排名先降后升，整体处于全国60–70名区间，属中上游211院校；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及拟录取研究生因不当言论被取消资格事件，对报考心理有轻微抑制作用；抖音热度排名第57位，评价为较热，短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未出现明显爆火或负面舆情扩散；第五轮学科评估中，环境科学与工程获评A，光学工程、土木工程、材料科学与工程、软件工程获评A-，共5个A-及以上学科；其中土木工程、材料科学与工程与该校在青海省招生的土木类、材料类（实验班）等专业直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在青海省招生专业以土木类、材料类、智能建造、应用化学为主，其中土木建筑类社会热度为分化观望，材料/化工类（生化环材大类）为明显劝退，整体专业热度偏冷；青海省2026年普通高考总人数约48000人（不确定），按近年物理类占比约63.9%估算约30672人，较2025年物理类30457人基本持平，竞争程度变化不大；北京工业大学位于北京市，属于一线城市高校，对青海省考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在青海省招生人数极少（每年仅6–8人），属外省招生占比极低院校，招生规模微小导致位次波动对计划变化敏感。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3394名、2026年扩招33%（6→8人）使位次数字预计后移约679名、软科排名回升（72→65）及北京地域偏好对位次有轻微上移作用、声誉偏负面及专业热度偏冷对报考热度有轻微抑制，经有限修正后预测2026年最低录取位次约4043名，区间3543–4543名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 材料类（实验班）（包含材料科学与工程、纳米材料与技术等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 智能建造
- 土木类（包含土木工程、建筑环境与能源应用工程等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 应用化学（色盲、色弱限报）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约4043名，区间3543–4543名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档（智能建造、土木类）为主力报考方向，一档（材料类实验班）可冲刺但需注意其社会热度偏冷，三档（应用化学）作为保底选择。位次明显优于区间下限（<3543名）可重点考虑冲击材料类实验班等A-学科专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for science/physics category in Qinghai Province were approximately 2941 → 3497 → 2979 → 3143 → 3394, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 453 positions over the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 3394; the enrollment plan for science/physics category in Qinghai Province was 6 students each year from 2021 to 2025, increasing to 8 students in 2026, an expansion of about 33%, which alleviates competition pressure but is expected to cause a backward shift in ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 59th in 2021 → 63rd in 2022 → 63rd in 2023 → 66th in 2024 → 72nd in 2025 → 65th in 2026, showing a decline followed by a rise in recent years, overall in the national 60–70 range, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly due to an incident where a prospective graduate student was disqualified for inappropriate remarks, which has a mild inhibitory effect on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 57th, rated as relatively hot, with short video exposure at a medium level, without obvious viral spread or negative public opinion; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Environmental Science and Engineering received an A rating, Optical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Software Engineering received A- ratings, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above; among them, Civil Engineering and Materials Science and Engineering directly correspond to the Civil Engineering and Materials (Experimental Class) majors enrolled in Qinghai Province, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The majors enrolled in Qinghai Province are mainly Civil Engineering, Materials, Intelligent Construction, and Applied Chemistry, among which the social popularity of civil construction majors is divided and wait-and-see, while materials/chemical majors (biochemical and environmental materials category) are clearly discouraged, with overall major popularity being relatively cold; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Qinghai Province in 2026 is about 48,000 (uncertain), estimated at about 30,672 based on the recent physics category proportion of about 63.9%, roughly unchanged from the 30,457 physics category candidates in 2025, with little change in competition level; Beijing University of Technology is located in Beijing, a first-tier city university, which has a strong regional appeal to candidates from Qinghai Province; the university enrolls very few students in Qinghai Province (only 6–8 per year), making it a university with an extremely low proportion of out-of-province enrollment, and the small enrollment scale makes ranking fluctuations sensitive to plan changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 3394, the 33% enrollment expansion in 2026 (6→8) is expected to cause a backward shift of about 679 positions, the Soft Science ranking recovery (72→65) and Beijing regional preference have a slight upward effect on rankings, and the slightly negative reputation and cold major popularity have a mild inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm. After limited correction, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 4043, with a range of 3543–4543.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Materials (Experimental Class) (including Materials Science and Engineering, Nanomaterials and Technology, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Intelligent Construction
- Civil Engineering (including Civil Engineering, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Applied Chemistry (color blindness and color weakness restricted)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 4043, with a range of 3543–4543. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range are advised to focus on Tier 2 (Intelligent Construction, Civil Engineering) as the main application direction, Tier 1 (Materials Experimental Class) can be attempted but note its relatively cold social popularity, and Tier 3 (Applied Chemistry) as a safety choice. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<3543) can consider aiming for Materials Experimental Class and other A- discipline majors.
